calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-08-2013 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (75 Vernon Street, San Francisco)
Off Calendar Sep-08-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was called with case number 292110 (Estate of D. J. Allen).

Appearances: Ernest Der for Rosie Murray. Jonathan Ferdon for the San Francisco Public Administrator.

Mr. Der stated that the re-appraisal had been filed this morning. Each estate holds 50% of the real property. The sale was confirmed at $571,000.00 for 100% of the real property, ($285,500.00 for each estate). The proceeds from the sale with regard to the estate of D. J. Allen will be deposited into a blocked account. Status for filing of said receipt was set for October 14, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court granted both petitions, (subject to the written orders).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-07-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Rosie Murray. Joel Balckman for the San Francisco Public Administrator (SFPA).

Mr. Der provided an endorsed copy of the Declination To Serve and Consent to the Public Administrator being appointed signed by Homerzelle Rousseve. The Court approved the petition and appointed the San Francisco Public Administrator. No bond is required.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-24-2009 Continued To Apr-07-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-10-2009 Continued To Mar-24-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
